---
name: New Device Profile
about: Propose or contribute a new honeypot device profile
title: "[PROFILE] "
labels: profile, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Device Type

What kind of device does this profile simulate? (e.g., router, printer, SCADA controller, VoIP phone)

## Services

Which protocols/ports should this device expose?

| Protocol | Port | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| HTTP | 80 | Web admin panel |
| ... | ... | ... |

## Realism Details

What banners, headers, default pages, or behaviors make this device convincing?

## AI Personality (optional)

Describe how the LLM should behave when simulating this device.

## References

Links to documentation, firmware dumps, or real device behavior that informed this profile.
